class.name: FestivalWorld
class.brief_description: All volatile per-run state: flags, inventory, outfit and presented items.
class.description: Everything here is wiped by [method reset] at the start of a run; only the [FestivalNotebook] survives. Together with the notebook and the clock and weather this forms the perception equation [code]NPC_Reaction = Outfit + Held_Items + World_State_Flags + Knowledge[/code]. Registered as the [code]FestivalWorld[/code] singleton.

signal.name: flag_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a world flag is set or erased.

signal.name: inventory_changed
signal.description: Emitted when items are added or removed.

signal.name: presented_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the set of presented items changes.

signal.name: world_reset
signal.description: Emitted when [method reset] wipes per-run state.
